name: Homeco Daily Needs Reit
analysis: HDN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.2850. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.3000, stop A$1.1806, target A$1.6583 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
